_README: TEMPLATE. Copy to region-config.json (gitignored) and fill with your own Copilot Studio agent endpoints. Served at runtime so the CUA region can change with no rebuild. Resolution: build-time VITE_DIRECTLINE_TOKEN_URL fallback -> /region-config.json -> ?region=<id>. Get directLineTokenUrl from Copilot Studio > Channels > Web app (the botsbyschema/<schema> segment is environment-specific). See docs/region-config.md.
